mapper.sql:
log_dt between to_timestamp(#{beginDay} || '000000', 'yyyymmddhh24miss') and to_timestamp(#{endDay} || '235959', 'yyyymmddhh24miss')
and member_id in (select member_id from cmmt_insider where login_id = #{workerLoginId})
mapper.select: /** LogtIndvdlinfoLogDao.selectList_count */ select count(*) as cnt from logt_indvdlinfo_log where

/** LogtIndvdlinfoLogDao.selectList_count */ select log_id ,log_dt ,member_id ,member_ip ,work_type_nm ,work_cn ,trgter_id ,fn_cmm_get_member(member_id) as member_nm ,fn_cmm_get_member(trgter_id) as trgter_nm ,#{totalItems} + 1 - (row_number() over (order by log_dt desc)) as rn from logt_indvdlinfo_log where
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}
